Class FilesystemFontProvider

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.font.FilesystemFontProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
FontProvider
public class FilesystemFontProvider extends Object implements FontProvider
A font provider that loads fonts from a base directory, using this format for locating TTF files: 
<base_dir>/<family>/<posture>/<weight>.ttf
where:
  • <base_dir> is the base directory path provided in the constructor;
  • <family> is the font family name as-is (without replacing spaces or changing case);
  • <posture> is the font's desired posture in lowercase;
  • <weight> is the font's desired weight in lowercase.

  • Constructor Details

    • FilesystemFontProvider

      public FilesystemFontProvider(@NonNull @NonNull Path baseDir, @NonNull @NonNull String fallbackFamily)
      Creates a new filesystem font provider.
      Parameters:
      baseDir - the base directory to locate fonts in
      fallbackFamily - the fallback font family, if one cannot be found (must exist in available families)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the base path does not exist or does not represent a directory

  • Method Details

    • getTTF

      public Path getTTF(String family, FontWeight weight, FontPosture posture)
      Description copied from interface: FontProvider
      Attempts to find a path to a TrueType font matching the given characteristics.

      Implementations are free to return a fallback font if no match is found (e.g. family doesn't exist, no such weight or posture).

      Specified by:
      getTTF in interface FontProvider
      Parameters:
      family - the font's preferred family
      weight - the font's preferred weight
      posture - the font's preferred posture
      Returns:
      the respective TTF file path
